hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); [ -z "$CMD" ] && exit 0; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '\bgit\b.*\bpush\b' && echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '\b(main|master)\b'; then echo 'BLOCKED [CIC]: push to main/master is not allowed. Agents may only push to feature/<job-id> branches.' >&2; exit 2; fi

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); [ -z "$CMD" ] && exit 0; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '\bgit\b.*\bpush\b.*(--force|-f)\b'; then echo 'BLOCKED [CIC]: git push --force is not allowed. Do not overwrite pushed commits on the feature branch.' >&2; exit 2; fi

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); [ -z "$CMD" ] && exit 0; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git\s+reset\s+--hard|git\s+clean\s+(-[a-z]*f[a-z]*d|-[a-z]*d[a-z]*f|-f\s+-d|-d\s+-f)'; then echo 'BLOCKED [CIC]: git reset --hard / git clean -fd is not allowed. Do not discard committed work.' >&2; exit 2; fi

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); [ -z "$CMD" ] && exit 0; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git\s+(checkout|switch)\s+(main|master)\b'; then echo 'BLOCKED [CIC]: checkout to main/master is not allowed inside the agent clone. Stay on feature/<job-id>.' >&2; exit 2; fi

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); [ -z "$CMD" ] && exit 0; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '\brm\s+.*-[rRf].*-[rRf]|\brm\s+-rf\b|\brm\s+-fr\b'; then if ! echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(node_modules|/dist/|/build/|__pycache__|/tmp/|/target/)'; then echo 'BLOCKED [CIC]: rm -rf is only allowed on safe targets (node_modules, dist, build, tmp, target). Do not delete workspace directories.' >&2; exit 2; fi; fi

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); [ -z "$CMD" ] && exit 0; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git\s+commit.*job:.*—\s*(running|done|error|pending)'; then echo 'BLOCKED [CIC]: orchestrator status commits (running/done/error/pending) are not allowed from agents. Only output/ content may be committed.' >&2; exit 2; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$FILE" ] && exit 0; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(env|pem|key|credentials|secret|crt)$'; then echo "BLOCKED [CIC]: writing to sensitive file is not allowed: $FILE — do not modify Vault keys or credentials." >&2; exit 2; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$FILE" ] && exit 0; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(so|wasm|\.o|a|dylib|exe)$'; then echo "BLOCKED [CIC]: writing binary artifact is not allowed: $FILE — do not commit build outputs, write a text report to output/ instead." >&2; exit 2; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$FILE" ] && exit 0; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(env|pem|key|credentials|secret|crt)$'; then echo "BLOCKED [CIC]: editing sensitive file is not allowed: $FILE" >&2; exit 2; fi
